content:
# Multi-Channel RAG Pipeline — Future Design Note (March 2026)

## Vision
One dedicated retrieval channel per memory type, running in parallel, fused via RRF or similar.

## Channel Strategies (Planned)
- Structural: keyword/exact match (code signatures)
- Decisional: graph-heavy + vector search
- Episodic: recency-weighted vector search
- Analytical: vector search + confidence reranking
- Procedural: vector search + access-frequency boost

## Compatibility with Tiered Knowledge Design
The tiered knowledge feature creates the exact foundation needed:
- memory_type field = partition key for channel routing
- Per-type alpha values = per-channel decay behavior
- Additive composite formula = per-channel weight customization
- Existing Retriever trait = one implementation per channel
- MultiChannelRetriever wraps all channels, fuses results

## Implementation Path
1. Current: single Retriever, filter by memory_type post-search (v1 tiered knowledge)
2. Future: per-type HNSW indexes for optimal recall
3. Future: per-type Retriever implementations with specialized strategies
4. Future: MultiChannelRetriever with configurable FusionStrategy (RRF with k=60)

## No Design Changes Needed
All current decisions are forward-compatible. memory_type field is the critical enabler.
